topic: AI Workflow Automation Benchmarks 2026: Real Performance Data Across Tools

competitors.title: Zapier vs Make vs n8n 2026: Automation Comparison
key_points: Make pricing starts at $9/month for 1,000 operations but enterprise connectors require $29+ plans
n8n's $20/month plan caps at 2,500 executions (multi-step workflows count as multiple executions)
Enterprise testing shows n8n (self-hosted) handles 10,000 daily executions across 50 workflows without performance degradation
Make consistently processes high-volume workflows but throttles aggressively during peak hours
Execution-based pricing (n8n) vs operation-based billing (Make) creates fundamentally different cost models
Latency benchmarks: Zapier AI steps add 5-15 seconds per step, compounding in multi-step Zaps

competitors.title: n8n vs Make 2026: Why Most Teams Pick the Wrong Tool
key_points: Performance benchmark: Self-hosted n8n on $3.80-10/month VPS handles 10,000+ daily executions
Cost benchmark: Self-hosted n8n research agent costs ~$0.50-1.00 per run vs $50+/month on Zapier/Make for equivalent daily execution
Latency benchmark: Make workflows show 40-60% faster execution than Zapier for non-AI workflows
AI integration benchmark: Make's natural language workflow creation reduces setup time by 75% for business users
Enterprise scalability benchmark: n8n supports 100+ concurrent workflow executions without degradation vs Make's 50 concurrent cap

competitors.title: Automation Tool Comparison 2026
key_points: Hybrid automation benchmark: AI agents for cognition + RPA for deterministic execution shows 3x ROI improvement
Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) benchmark varies significantly by volume: 5,000+ monthly executions favors self-hosted n8n
AI integration approaches benchmark: Natural language creation reduces setup time 50-75% vs traditional workflow building
Enterprise adoption benchmarks: 78% of Fortune 500 companies now use AI workflow automation, with 40% adopting multiple platforms

competitors.title: Zapier AI Automation Benchmarks 2026
key_points: Performance benchmark: Zapier workflows complete in 1-3 seconds for simple triggers, AI steps add 5-15 seconds latency
Cost benchmark: Zapier's task-based pricing at $19.99/month for 750 tasks suits small businesses but scales poorly
Reliability benchmark: Zapier maintains 99.9% uptime with automatic retry logic for failed workflows
Enterprise benchmark: Zapier for Salesforce processes 1M+ records/day with sub-second latency for data sync workflows

stats.fact: n8n (self-hosted) handles 10,000 daily executions across 50 workflows without performance degradation on $3.80-10/month VPS
Make consistently processes high-volume workflows but throttles aggressively during peak hours, limiting enterprise scalability

Self-hosted n8n research agent costs ~$0.50-1.00 per run vs $50+/month on Zapier/Make for equivalent daily execution volume
AI workflow automation market grows from $4.79B in 2025 to $5.6B in 2026 at 17% CAGR
